raw_consumer_statement: Barclaycard 's dispute process is broken and unusable. Any dispute is filtered through a few limited questions that don't cover many cases with no opportunity to comment. The only document upload provided is .jpeg - seriously? Barclaycard is, presumably intentionally, making a dispute almost impossible. They must try to wear down customers via horrible web portals, limited options, obscure communications. If and when you talk to an agent there is a language barrier as they must be using low cost labor from overseas with very basic XXXX skills.
